title: Mobregon's Edition
description: A pack for the youtuber Mobgregon
body:
![title image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dccd289c4109ee1e7d8e6410a642dd1885bc5737.png).
A pack for the Youtuber Mobregon.
![Custom Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kGXNVKTZ/images/e1406062a0cfc55b303f69a1781d70f70ddcc004.png)

**Features:**
- Low Fire
- Custom Weapons
- 32X Armor
- 3D End Crystals
- Ore Outline
- Wool Outline

And More!

**Weapon Names**
1. Garbage (Netherite Axe)
2. Backstabber (Diamond Axe)
3. Galatic Axe (Diamond/Netherite Axe)
4. Fire Blade (Diamond/Nethertie Sword)
5. Power of No Grass (Diamond/Netherite Axe)

**Requires CIT Resewn to work properly**
